import { Task } from '../managers/tasks'; import { Entry, EntryItem, ReaderOptions } from '../types'; import ReaderAsync from '../readers/async'; import Provider from './provider'; export default class ProviderAsync extends Provider<Promise<EntryItem[]>> { protected _reader: ReaderAsync; read(task: Task): Promise<EntryItem[]>; api(root: string, task: Task, options: ReaderOptions): Promise<Entry[]>; }
